model_comparison: Both models successfully adhere to the instruction to read the sentence with a high pitch. Model 1 provides a performance that is not only high-pitched but also energetic and crisp, which aligns perfectly with the semantic content of the sentence ('I feel great'). The pitch elevation in Model 1 is very clear and consistent. Model 2, while high-pitched, adopts a slower, breathier delivery that feels less energetic and slightly less distinct than Model 1.
